privileged_info_summary: The task involves configuring synthetic JFrog Artifactory infrastructure for a retail/e-commerce scenario. The environment runs Artifactory at http://localhost:8082 with credentials admin/password. The infrastructure must include three npm repositories: 'npm-internal', 'npmjs-mirror', and 'npm-all'. It also requires a user 'frontend-lead' (email: frontend-lead@globalretail.com), a group 'frontend-developers', and a permission target 'frontend-npm-perms'.
